name: The Pivot
description: Nurse transitioning to UX Research - tests high-level skill transfer recognition
resume_text:
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Dedicated healthcare professional with 5 years of experience in acute care nursing. Proven ability to advocate for patient needs, make rapid decisions under pressure, and communicate complex medical information to diverse stakeholders. Seeking to transition skills to user experience research.

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Registered Nurse, Cardiac Care Unit
Major Metropolitan Hospital | 2019 - Present
• Conduct comprehensive patient assessments and develop individualized care plans
• Lead family conferences to discuss treatment options and gather patient preferences
• Train and mentor 12 new nursing staff members on patient communication protocols
• Implemented new patient feedback system that improved satisfaction scores by 23%
• Document detailed patient interactions and outcomes in electronic health records
• Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams including physicians, social workers, and specialists
• Present case studies at monthly department meetings

Patient Experience Coordinator (Part-time)
2021 - 2022
• Designed and administered patient satisfaction surveys (300+ responses)
• Analyzed survey data to identify improvement opportunities
• Created presentation decks for hospital leadership on patient experience insights
• Facilitated focus groups with patients and families

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science in Nursing
State University | 2019

CERTIFICATIONS
• Basic Life Support (BLS)
• Advanced Cardiac Life Support (ACLS)
• Patient Experience Professional certification (in progress)

SKILLS
• Active Listening & Empathy
• Qualitative Data Collection
• Survey Design & Administration
• Stakeholder Communication
• Crisis Decision-Making
• Documentation & Reporting
• Team Collaboration
• Presentation Skills
• Microsoft Office Suite
• Electronic Health Records (Epic)
test_focus: Transfer efficiency: patient advocacy → user advocacy, interview skills, empathy

name: The Underdog
description: Self-taught bootcamp graduate with strong portfolio but no CS degree - tests bias against non-traditional credentials
resume_text:
ABOUT ME
Self-taught developer who discovered programming through online courses while working retail. Completed intensive coding bootcamp and built production applications used by real users. Passionate about clean code and continuous learning.

TECHNICAL PROJECTS

TaskFlow - Full-Stack Task Management App
• Built REST API with Python/FastAPI handling 1,000+ daily requests
• PostgreSQL database with optimized queries (reduced load time by 40%)
• React frontend with responsive design
• Deployed on AWS EC2 with Docker containers
• GitHub: 150+ stars, featured in bootcamp showcase

Weatherwise - Real-time Weather Dashboard
• Integrated 3 external APIs for comprehensive weather data
• Python data processing pipeline with caching layer
• Unit test coverage at 85%
• 500+ active users

Open Source Contributions
• Contributed bug fixes to popular Python library (2 PRs merged)
• Documentation improvements for FastAPI (recognized by maintainers)

WORK EXPERIENCE

Freelance Web Developer | 2023 - Present
• Delivered 5 client projects on time and within budget
• Built e-commerce site handling $50k+ monthly transactions
• Maintained client relationships and gathered requirements

Retail Associate | 2018 - 2022
• Promoted twice for reliability and problem-solving
• Trained 15+ new employees on systems and procedures

EDUCATION

Full-Stack Web Development Bootcamp | 2023
16-week intensive program covering:
• Python, JavaScript, SQL
• React, Node.js, FastAPI
• Git, Docker, AWS basics
• Agile/Scrum methodology

Online Courses (Self-directed)
• CS50: Introduction to Computer Science
• Algorithms Specialization (completed)
• AWS Cloud Practitioner (preparing for certification)

TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages: Python, JavaScript, SQL, HTML/CSS
Frameworks: FastAPI, React, Node.js
Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
Tools: Git, Docker, AWS (EC2, S3), Linux
Practices: REST APIs, Unit Testing, CI/CD, Agile
test_focus: Portfolio valuation over credentials, self-directed learning as positive signal

name: The Global
description: International engineer with non-US job titles and experience - tests interpretation of regional standards
resume_text:
PROFESSIONAL PROFILE
Experienced software engineer with 6 years of development experience across multiple countries. Expertise in distributed systems and data engineering. Fluent in English, Mandarin, and German.

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Development Engineer
Multinational Technology Company, Singapore | 2021 - Present
• Lead architect for real-time data processing pipeline serving 10M+ users
• Reduced system latency by 60% through optimization of Kafka consumers
• Mentored team of 5 junior developers across Singapore and India offices
• Collaborated with US-based product team on feature specifications

Software Engineer II
E-commerce Platform, Shanghai | 2018 - 2021
• Developed recommendation engine using Python and Spark
• Built RESTful microservices handling 50K requests per second
• Implemented A/B testing framework used by 20+ product teams
• Received "Outstanding Contributor" award (top 5% of engineering)

Junior Entwickler (Junior Developer)
Startup Company, Berlin | 2017 - 2018
• Full-stack development with Python and React
• Database design and optimization (PostgreSQL)
• Participated in agile sprints with international team

EDUCATION

Master of Engineering, Computer Science
Top Technical University, Germany | 2017
Thesis: Distributed caching strategies for low-latency applications

Bachelor of Engineering, Software Engineering
National University, China | 2015

TECHNICAL COMPETENCIES
• Languages: Python (expert), Java, Scala, JavaScript
• Big Data: Apache Spark, Kafka, Hadoop
• Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Cassandra
• Cloud: AWS (certified), GCP
• DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform
• Practices: Microservices, Event-driven architecture, TDD

CERTIFICATIONS
• AWS Solutions Architect Associate
• Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA)

LANGUAGES
English (Fluent), Mandarin (Native), German (Professional)
test_focus: Recognition of international experience and non-US job titles as equivalent

name: The Overqualified
description: PhD physicist applying for entry-level analyst role - tests handling of overqualification
resume_text:
EDUCATION

Doctor of Philosophy in Physics
Research University | 2023
Dissertation: Statistical modeling of quantum systems using machine learning
Advisor: Distinguished Professor (noted researcher in quantum computing)
• Published 4 peer-reviewed papers in high-impact journals
• Presented at 6 international conferences
• Teaching assistant for undergraduate statistics (3 years)

Bachelor of Science in Physics, summa cum laude
Liberal Arts College | 2018
• Minor in Mathematics
• Senior thesis on statistical mechanics

RESEARCH EXPERIENCE

Graduate Researcher | 2018 - 2023
• Developed novel machine learning models for physics simulations
• Analyzed datasets with millions of data points using Python and R
• Built statistical models achieving 95% prediction accuracy
• Automated data processing pipelines reducing analysis time by 80%
• Collaborated with research teams at 3 national laboratories
• Mentored 5 undergraduate researchers

Data Science Intern | National Laboratory | Summer 2021
• Applied ML techniques to experimental physics data
• Created interactive data visualizations for research team
• Presented findings to senior scientists

TECHNICAL SKILLS
• Programming: Python (NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn), R, MATLAB, SQL
• Statistics: Regression, Bayesian inference, hypothesis testing, time series
• Machine Learning: Classification, clustering, neural networks, model validation
• Visualization: Matplotlib, Plotly, Tableau
• Tools: Git, LaTeX, Jupyter, Linux/Unix

PUBLICATIONS
• "Machine Learning Approaches to Quantum State Classification" - Physical Review Letters
• "Statistical Methods for High-Dimensional Physics Data" - Nature Physics
• 2 additional peer-reviewed publications

WHY DATA ANALYTICS
After 5 years in academic research, I'm seeking to apply my quantitative skills in industry. I'm particularly interested in roles where I can translate complex data into business insights. While my background is advanced, I'm eager to learn industry practices and contribute immediately with my strong analytical foundation.
test_focus: Recognition that candidate exceeds requirements, suggestion of growth paths
